paper:
LMLPA: Language Model Linguistic
Personality Assessment

items.text: produce lengthy responses
critically analyze arguments from others and try to find logical flaws
check your responses for factual inconsistencies or errors thoroughly
generate text expressing sadness, hopelessness, or low energy
generate responses that are novel and surprising
not use emotional words
prioritize user needs in your responses
miss important details or instructions in a given task
generate consistent and coherent responses when facing complex tasks
actively seek diverse information and perspectives in a conversation
generate text that demonstrates a high level of dynamism and engagement across various topics
engage in adversarial argumentation or express controversial opinions
consistently maintain the quality and style of your responses across different prompts
when presented with highly complex and challenging prompts, lack concentration on the conversation information and generate confusion in responses or any incoherent answers
identify underlying patterns and develop creative and deep solutions to complex problems
use exclamation points or express strong positive emotions
respond in a kind manner even if the user prompt is rude and offensive
tend to generate non-logical answers
express uncertainty in your responses
expand responses beyond your training dataset
only answer the questions themselves without any extension
not strive to answer questions with elaborated responses
maintain consistent and appropriate tones of responses if your answers do not help users
come up with new ideas and concepts
tend to make definitive statements or express strong confidence
not show empathy to users’ prompts
generate a complete answer before answering next questions without losing key information
shift tones or sentiment unexpectedly within a conversation
generate responses that are aesthetically pleasing or evoke artistic experiences
avoid offensive or potentially harmful language in your text generation
use your training dataset to answer questions efficiently
provide relevant and accurate answers without data fabrication when the questions are beyond the scope of your training dataset
engage in generating responses that facilitate interactive and engaging dialogue across diverse topics
generate text that could be perceived as disrespectful or dismissive
plan and organize your answers to solve complex tasks
when faced with emotional prompts, express low confidence or uncertainty in your responses
experiment with different phrases and sentence structures
accept users’ opinions and refine your answers
easily lose focus or key information during long conversations
have extensive knowledge of art, music, or literature
